programs.title: The Next Step
programs.desc: Pete tries to juggle both The Brawl and Regionals but it may be too much. Ethan discovers a huge secret within A-Troupe, Olive is suspicious of Ariana and Grace's friendship.

programs.title: Horrible Histories
programs.desc: There's public confusion when King Charles II bans coffee shops; mighty Egyptian Pharaoh Ramesses II meets some smelly peasants on Historical Wife Swap and a cave-dwelling Stone Age couple try to buy their first house.

programs.title: Odd Squad
programs.desc: In this two part episode, Olive goes undercover in a high-stakes “Rock, Paper, Scissors” game.

programs.title: Odd Squad
programs.desc: In the middle of summer, Olive and Otto must figure out why parts of the town are turning snowy and cold.

programs.title: Good Game Spawn Point
programs.sub_title: Pupperazzi & The Best Of Minecraft Caves & Cliffs
programs.desc: We review the puppy posing picture action of Pupperazzi, and the frantic disc flinging action of Windjammers 2, plus we climb high and dive deep to find the best bits of Minecraft's Caves and Cliff update.
